# Evaluation Fixture Boundary Guidance

This directory is reserved for repo-safe fixtures only.

- Repo-safe fixtures may be committed when they contain synthetic or otherwise redistributable content.
- Restricted external references must stay outside the repository and be tracked only through metadata-safe references.
- Access metadata must accompany restricted external references when later evaluation work consumes them.
- Phase 1A starter corpus fixtures must include deterministic positives, negatives, context pairs, overlap/operator cases, structured JSON cases, and adversarial smoke cases.
- Baseline comparison runs must record reproducibility metadata (`run_id`, timestamps, git revision, dataset inventory id, and metric-group snapshot).
- `datasets/phase_1a_starter.jsonl` is the repo-safe starter dataset used by runtime replay tests.
- `datasets/restricted-dataset-manifest.example.yaml` documents the expected local-only manifest shape for restricted datasets.
- `datasets/open-cache/*.json` is generated by the open-dataset autoload pipeline tests and should not be committed.
- `scripts/eval/download_open_datasets.sh` performs explicit open-dataset snapshot download for:
  - `ai4privacy/pii-masking-200k`
  - `nvidia/Nemotron-PII`
  - `gretelai/gretel-pii-masking-en-v1`
  - `microsoft/presidio-research` repository metadata
- Retention policy and governance decisions remain outside the architecture-foundation scope.
